posts.content: RT @NewtGingrichAfter spending this week reviewing the Iranian war I am now convinced President Trump is on the edge of an historic victory. The real breakthrough for me came as I reviewed President Trump's decisions and maneuvers not from the standpoint of American unilateralism but from the standpoint of the leader of a remarkable historic coalition, the largest coalition ever put together in the modern Middle East. Everyone understands that Israel is an important ally. What is little discussed is the depth of support from the United Arab Emirates, Qatar, Bahrain, Saudi Arabia and other countries in the region. It has to be sobering for the Iranian dictatorship to realize that it does not have a  single ally willing to challenge the American naval blockade. Slowly, gradually, timidly, our European allies are lining up to help with the Persian Gulf and the Strait of Hormuz. A great deal of President Trump's maneuvers against Iran make sense once he is seen as a coalition leader and not just as a unilateral American President. I spent a lot of the last couple weeks reviewing kinetic options including wining the battle of the Persian Gulf and the Strait of Hormuz and if necessary using the shocking and shattering level of force President Nixon and Secretary Kissinger used against Hanoi and Haiphong in Christmas 1972 (which both leaders believed convinced the North Vietnamese to agree to a truce and the freeing of American POWs). If this were a unilateral American campaign I could enthusiastically support a more aggressive kinetic campaign. However it is also clear it would shatter the coalition because our Arab allies are convinced Iran could still do enormous damage to their oil fields and infrastructure. Coalitions are inherently slower than unilateral campaigns. However coalitions ultimately bring vastly more power to the fight. I am as frustrated as everyone else by the pace of talking with the dictatorship but having reviewed the correlation of forces and the options available to the coalition on one side and the Iranian religiously motivated dictatorship on the other I am prepared to assert that President Trump's coalition leadership (something almost none of his critics want to acknowledge) is within reach of an enormous historic victory. And if the Iranian dictatorship ultimately  proves it is hopelessly  committed to a suicidal position there will be plenty of time for a kinetic campaign of enormous power and effectiveness. Either way we are on the edge of an astonishing victory for our values and for a safer Middle East.

posts.content: RT @realDonaldTrumpIran must agree that they will never have a Nuclear Weapon or Bomb. The Hormuz Strait must be immediately open, no tolls, for unrestricted shipping traffic, in both directions. All water mines (bombs), if any, will be terminated (we have removed, through detonation, numerous such mines with our great underwater mine sweepers. Iran will complete the immediate removal and/or detonation of any mines that are left, which will not be many!). Ships caught in the Strait due to our amazing and unprecedented Naval Blockade, which will now be lifted, may start the process of "heading home!" Say HELLO to your wives, husbands, parents, and families from me, your favorite President! The enriched material, sometimes referred to as "Nuclear Dust," which is buried deep underground with virtually collapsed mountains, caused by our powerful B2 Bomber attack 11 months ago, sitting on top of it, will be unearthed by the United States (which, it is agreed, is the only Country, along with China, with the mechanical capability of doing so!), in close coordination and conjunction with the Islamic Republic of Iran, plus the International Atomic Energy Agency, and DESTROYED. No money will be exchanged, until further notice. Other items, of far less importance, have been agreed to. I will be meeting now, in the Situation Room, to make a final determination. Thank you for your attention to this matter! President DONALD J. TRUMP

저는 네바다주 제2연방하원의 선거구의 훌륭한 주민들을 대표하기 위해 출마한 미국 우선의 애국자, 데이비드 플리포(David Flippo)를 지지하게 되어 큰 영광입니다! 그는 네바다에서 가장 큰 존경을 받는 MAGA 전사들, 그리고 미 연방하원 내 많은 공화당 의원들의 강력한 지지를 받고 있습니다. 저는 2024년 네바다에서 사실상 압승을 거뒀고, 그곳에서는 항상 대단히 좋은 성과를 내왔습니다. 저는 그 주를 사랑합니다 — 그곳 사람들은 특별합니다! 저는 결코 여러분을 실망시키지 않을 것이며, 데이비드 플리포와 함께라면 그 약속을 더욱 확고히 하는 것입니다. 그는 여러분에게, 그 주에, 그리고 우리 나라에 GREAT할 것입니다! 민주당과 데이비드의 일부 공화당 경쟁자들은 NO TAX ON TIPS를 끝내려 하고 있습니다. 하지만 데이비드와 제가 지키는 한 그런 일은 없을 것입니다!

미 공군 예비역 중령인 데이비드는 우리 나라를 수호하고, 우리의 놀라운 군인/재향군인을 지원하며, PEACE THROUGH STRENGTH를 보장하는 데 필요한 지혜와 용기를 잘 알고 있습니다. 성공한 소기업 소유주이자 지역사회 지도자인 데이비드는, 의회 출마 이전부터 자신의 지역사회를 위해 헌신해 왔습니다. 여러분의 차기 연방하원의원으로서 데이비드는 경제 성장, 감세와 규제 완화, NO TAX ON TIPS 추진, 미국 에너지 DOMINANCE 실현, MADE IN THE U.S.A. 수호, 국경 SECURE 유지, 이민자 범죄 차단, 선거 보호, 그리고 항상 공격받고 있는 수정헌법 제2조의 권리를 지키기 위해 강력히 싸울 것입니다.

데이비드 플리포는 네바다주 제2연방하원의 선거구의 차기 대표가 되기 위해 저의 완전하고 전적인 지지를 받았습니다 – HE WILL NEVER LET YOU DOWN! 대통령 DONALD J. TRUMP

posts.content: RT @NewtGingrichAfter spending this week reviewing the Iranian war I am now convinced President Trump is on the edge of an historic victory. The real breakthrough for me came as I reviewed President Trump's decisions and maneuvers not from the standpoint of American unilateralism but from the standpoint of the leader of a remarkable historic coalition, the largest coalition ever put together in the modern Middle East. Everyone understands that Israel is an important ally. What is little discussed is the depth of support from the United Arab Emirates, Qatar, Bahrain, Saudi Arabia and other countries in the region. It has to be sobering for the Iranian dictatorship to realize that it does not have a  single ally willing to challenge the American naval blockade. Slowly, gradually, timidly, our European allies are lining up to help with the Persian Gulf and the Strait of Hormuz. A great deal of President Trump's maneuvers against Iran make sense once he is seen as a coalition leader and not just as a unilateral American President. I spent a lot of the last couple weeks reviewing kinetic options including wining the battle of the Persian Gulf and the Strait of Hormuz and if necessary using the shocking and shattering level of force President Nixon and Secretary Kissinger used against Hanoi and Haiphong in Christmas 1972 (which both leaders believed convinced the North Vietnamese to agree to a truce and the freeing of American POWs). If this were a unilateral American campaign I could enthusiastically support a more aggressive kinetic campaign. However it is also clear it would shatter the coalition because our Arab allies are convinced Iran could still do enormous damage to their oil fields and infrastructure. Coalitions are inherently slower than unilateral campaigns. However coalitions ultimately bring vastly more power to the fight. I am as frustrated as everyone else by the pace of talking with the dictatorship but having reviewed the correlation of forces and the options available to the coalition on one side and the Iranian religiously motivated dictatorship on the other I am prepared to assert that President Trump's coalition leadership (something almost none of his critics want to acknowledge) is within reach of an enormous historic victory. And if the Iranian dictatorship ultimately  proves it is hopelessly  committed to a suicidal position there will be plenty of time for a kinetic campaign of enormous power and effectiveness. Either way we are on the edge of an astonishing victory for our values and for a safer Middle East.

Either way we are on the edge of an astonishing victory for our values and for a safer Middle East.
posts.content_zh_cn: RT @NewtGingrichAfter spending this week reviewing the Iranian war I am now convinced President Trump is on the edge of an historic victory. The real breakthrough for me came as I reviewed President Trump's decisions and maneuvers not from the standpoint of American unilateralism but from the standpoint of the leader of a remarkable historic coalition, the largest coalition ever put together in the modern Middle East. Everyone understands that Israel is an important ally. What is little discussed is the depth of support from the United Arab Emirates, Qatar, Bahrain, Saudi Arabia and other countries in the region. It has to be sobering for the Iranian dictatorship to realize that it does not have a  single ally willing to challenge the American naval blockade. Slowly, gradually, timidly, our European allies are lining up to help with the Persian Gulf and the Strait of Hormuz. A great deal of President Trump's maneuvers against Iran make sense once he is seen as a coalition leader and not just as a unilateral American President. I spent a lot of the last couple weeks reviewing kinetic options including wining the battle of the Persian Gulf and the Strait of Hormuz and if necessary using the shocking and shattering level of force President Nixon and Secretary Kissinger used against Hanoi and Haiphong in Christmas 1972 (which both leaders believed convinced the North Vietnamese to agree to a truce and the freeing of American POWs). If this were a unilateral American campaign I could enthusiastically support a more aggressive kinetic campaign. However it is also clear it would shatter the coalition because our Arab allies are convinced Iran could still do enormous damage to their oil fields and infrastructure. Coalitions are inherently slower than unilateral campaigns. However coalitions ultimately bring vastly more power to the fight. posts.content: Iran must agree that they will never have a Nuclear Weapon or Bomb. The Hormuz Strait must be immediately open, no tolls, for unrestricted shipping traffic, in both directions. All water mines (bombs), if any, will be terminated (we have removed, through detonation, numerous such mines with our great underwater mine sweepers. Iran will complete the immediate removal and/or detonation of any mines that are left, which will not be many!). Ships caught in the Strait due to our amazing and unprecedented Naval Blockade, which will now be lifted, may start the process of "heading home!" Say HELLO to your wives, husbands, parents, and families from me, your favorite President! The enriched material, sometimes referred to as "Nuclear Dust," which is buried deep underground with virtually collapsed mountains, caused by our powerful B2 Bomber attack 11 months ago, sitting on top of it, will be unearthed by the United States (which, it is agreed, is the only Country, along with China, with the mechanical capability of doing so!), in close coordination and conjunction with the Islamic Republic of Iran, plus the International Atomic Energy Agency, and DESTROYED. No money will be exchanged, until further notice. Other items, of far less importance, have been agreed to. I will be meeting now, in the Situation Room, to make a final determination. Thank you for your attention to this matter! President DONALD J. TRUMP

posts.content_zh_cn:
伊朗必须同意，永远不得拥有核武器或核弹。霍尔木兹海峡必须立即开放，不得收取任何通行费，允许双向船舶交通不受限制。

所有水雷（炸弹），如有，将被清除（我们已动用卓越的水下扫雷力量，通过引爆方式清除了大量此类水雷。伊朗将立即完成对剩余任何水雷的清除和/或引爆，数量不会很多！）。

因我们惊人且前所未有的海上封锁而滞留在海峡中的船只——该封锁现将解除——现在可以开始“返航！” 代我向你们的妻子、丈夫、父母和家人问好，我是你们最喜爱的总统！

那些经过浓缩的材料，有时被称为“核尘埃”，深埋于地下，上方几乎坍塌的山体是由我们11个月前强大的B2轰炸机打击所造成，如今压在其上。这些材料将由美国负责挖出——大家一致同意，除中国外，只有美国具备实施这一工作的机械能力！——并在与伊朗伊斯兰共和国及国际原子能机构密切协调、合作下予以销毁。

在另行通知前，不会有任何资金支付。其他一些重要性低得多的事项，也已达成一致。

我现在将前往战情室，作出最终决定。感谢你们对此事的关注！

总统 唐纳德·J·特朗普

posts.content_ko:
이란은 결코 핵무기나 핵폭탄을 보유하지 않겠다는 데 동의해야 합니다. 호르무즈 해협은 즉시 개방되어야 하며, 어떤 통행료도 없이 양방향 선박 운항이 제한 없이 허용되어야 합니다.

모든 기뢰(폭탄)는, 있다면, 제거될 것입니다(우리는 우리의 뛰어난 수중 소해 역량을 통해 폭파 방식으로 이러한 기뢰를 다수 제거했습니다. 이란은 남아 있는 모든 기뢰에 대해 즉각 제거 및/또는 폭파를 완료할 것이며, 그 수는 많지 않을 것입니다!).

우리의 놀랍고 전례 없는 해상 봉쇄로 인해 해협에 발이 묶였던 선박들은—이 봉쇄는 이제 해제됩니다—이제 “귀항!” 절차를 시작할 수 있습니다. 여러분의 아내, 남편, 부모님, 그리고 가족들에게 내가 안부를 전한다고 전해주십시오. 여러분이 가장 좋아하는 대통령으로부터 말입니다!

때때로 “핵 먼지”라고도 불리는 농축 물질은 지하 깊숙이 묻혀 있으며, 그 위에는 우리가 11개월 전 강력한 B2 폭격기 공격으로 사실상 붕괴시킨 산이 내려앉아 있습니다. 이 물질은 미국이 발굴할 것이며—중국과 함께, 이에 필요한 기계적 역량을 갖춘 나라는 미국뿐이라는 데 합의가 이뤄졌습니다!—이란 이슬람 공화국 및 국제원자력기구(IAEA)와 긴밀히 조율하고 협력하는 가운데 파기될 것입니다.

추후 공지가 있을 때까지 어떤 금전도 오가지 않을 것입니다. 중요성이 훨씬 덜한 다른 사안들에 대해서도 합의가 이뤄졌습니다.

나는 지금 상황실에서 최종 결정을 내리기 위한 회의를 할 것입니다. 이 사안에 관심을 가져주셔서 감사합니다!

대통령 도널드 J. 트럼프

posts.content_ko: 질 바이든은 이제야 마침내, 시청률도 매우 높았고 정말 대단했던 우리의 2024년 대선 토론에서 ‘졸린 조’에게 도대체 무슨 일이 벌어졌는지 자신도 몰랐다고 공개적으로 인정하고 있다. 당시 조의 토론 퍼포먼스는 결코 높은 수준의 기준에 미치지 못했다. 그녀는 그가 “뇌졸중”을 겪고 있다고 생각했고, 그 밖에도 여러 정말 심각한 일들이 벌어지고 있다고 여겼다고 말했다. 그런데도 어떤 좋은 아내라면 그랬을 것처럼, 곤경에 처한 남편을 돕기 위해 무대로 급히 올라오지는 않았다. 그녀가 유일하게 언급하지 않은 것은, 그가 거의 완전히 무너지기 전에 내가 얼마나 잘하고 있었는가 하는 점이다. 다시 말해, 많은 사람들이 묻듯이, 그 토론에서 나의 강한 퍼포먼스가 그를 단순하고도 명백하게 “주눅 들게” 만들어 치명적으로 무너지게 했고, 그 결과 그의 불명예스러운 패배로 이어진 것인지, 아니면 다른 이유가 있었던 것인지다. 그 답을 아는 사람은 아무도 없다, BUT I DO!!!
